errors.title: An attribute value provided is invalid with the expected format.
errors.detail: The provided versionString '99.x.0' does not match the expected format of MAJOR.MINOR or MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH (e.g. 1.0 or 1.0.1).

errors.title: A required relationship is missing.
errors.detail: The relationship 'app' is required but was not provided.
